name: area: content
description: Marketing copy, docs content, localization, and release metadata.

name: area: deployment
description: Cloudflare Workers static deployment, Wrangler, DNS, or release delivery.

name: area: security
description: Security posture, public asset auditability, secrets handling, or supply-chain gates.

name: area: site
description: Astro pages, components, styles, scripts, and public assets.

name: area: tooling
description: Bun scripts, linting, formatting, hooks, labels, and repo automation.

name: type: chore
description: Maintenance that does not change user-facing behavior.

name: type: ci
description: GitHub Actions, Dependabot, labeler, or automation changes.

name: type: docs
description: Documentation, repository guidance, or issue and PR templates.

name: type: hardening
description: Defensive work that reduces a class of bugs or operational risk.
